channel.title: Accounting, Economics, and Law: A Convivium
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Accounting, Economics, and Law: A Convivium

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Siew Hong Teoh, Yinglei Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ael-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Limits of Empirical Studies in Accounting and Social Sciences: A Constructive Critique from Accounting, Economics and the Law
item.description: Article by Siew Hong Teoh, Yinglei Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ael-2021-0089

item.title: Accounting Research’s “Flat Earth” Problem
item.description: Article by Siew Hong Teoh, Yinglei Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ael-2021-0045

item.title: Accounting Research as Bayesian Inference to the Best Explanation
item.description: Article by Siew Hong Teoh, Yinglei Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ael-2021-0083

item.title: The Elephant in the Room: p-hacking and Accounting Research
item.description: Article by Siew Hong Teoh, Yinglei Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ael-2022-0111

item.title: De-emphasizing Statistical Significance

item.title: Statistical versus Economic Significance in Accounting: A Reality Check
item.description: Article by Siew Hong Teoh, Yinglei Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ael-2023-0002

item.title: Another Way Forward: Comments on Ohlson’s Critique of Empirical Accounting Research

item.title: Setting Statistical Hurdles for Publishing in Accounting
